title: Add evidence and diff metadata to proposal artifacts
summary: Extend proposal artifact markdown and native read-back surfaces with clearer evidence summaries and diff-oriented metadata so proposal review stays more truthful before any future apply step.
acceptance_criteria: Proposal artifact export writes deterministic diff-oriented metadata without breaking older proposal markdown files.
Proposal artifact parsing reads the new metadata when present and falls back safely when it is absent.
Native proposal list and detail surfaces expose stronger evidence and diff summaries.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: HS-0020 ticket schema validated after extending proposal artifacts with evidence and diff metadata.
Patch hygiene passed after updating proposal export, read-back parsing, and native proposal surfaces.
Repo contract validation passed after adding localized proposal metadata labels and summaries.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Native macOS build succeeded after adding proposal evidence summary and diff-oriented metadata.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 re-rank after HS-0019: proposal artifacts still need clearer evidence summary and diff-oriented metadata before apply-preview trust can move further.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Preserve backward compatibility for older proposal markdown.
Keep root checkout clean after lane claim and release.
